subject: [PATCH 9/9] sched/rt: defer WARN console output under rq->lock

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch modifies the WARN*() calls in the Linux kernel to use SCHED_WARN*() variants instead, which defer console output to an irq_work queue rather than emitting it synchronously. This change prevents potential deadlocks that can occur when a legacy or boot console is configured. The patch specifically targets code paths where rq->lock or ->pi_lock are held.
